# D3VIEW — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> D3VIEW is an engineering software and data analytics platform focused on CAE (Computer-Aided Engineering) and simulation solutions. The brand serves engineering professionals and organizations looking to analyze, visualize, and manage simulation data. The company has an established web presence at d3view.com that serves as the reference point for the new site rebuild.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Transform how you analyze, visualize, and manage simulation data with D3VIEW&#39;s advanced CAE platform. Built for engineers who demand faster insights. Start optimizing today.

### Platform
https://example.com/platform
Explore the D3VIEW platform engineered to unify CAE data, streamline workflows, and accelerate decision-making. See how our tools turn complex datasets into actionable engineering intelligence.

### Solutions
https://example.com/solutions
Discover D3VIEW&#39;s specialized solutions for automotive, aerospace, and industrial simulation. From finite element analysis to data collection, we solve your toughest engineering challenges.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to elevate your CAE workflow? Connect with D3VIEW&#39;s team to discuss your engineering data challenges. Let&#39;s build a smarter simulation strategy together.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- Email: info@d3view.com
- Address: 1130 Tienken Ct., Suite 102, Rochester Hills, MI, 48306, United States

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/platform
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About D3VIEW
D3VIEW is an engineering software and data analytics platform focused on CAE (Computer-Aided Engineering) and simulation solutions. The brand serves engineering professionals and organizations looking to analyze, visualize, and manage simulation data. The company has an established web presence at d3view.com that serves as the reference point for the new site rebuild.

## Target Audience
- Aerospace Engineers
- Automotive Design Teams
- Civil & Structural Engineers
- University Research Labs
- Industrial R&D Teams
- Health care

## Industry
Engineering Software / CAE Solutions

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
